name: runway
description: Coordinate parallel Codex agents with pre-edit scope clearance, a bounded patch guard, executed verification, and Git-audited handoffs.

interface.shortDescription: Stop overlapping Codex work before edits begin.
interface.longDescription: Runway declares file, symbol, and behavioral scope before work; blocks out-of-lane Codex patch calls; and requires executed proof plus a fresh Git audit before handoff.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $runway to declare and reserve a bounded lane before editing this repository.
